name: vinuni_admissions
description: VinUni undergraduate admission facts, verified 2026-06-24 from v2-indexed authoritative pages, NOT bot output. SCORED = passes on v2+D9: the 3 admission rounds (Early/Regular/Rolling). The undergraduate admission GPA (8.0) cases were moved to golden_targets/admissions_financial_retrieval.json (the admissions FAQ is out-ranked by the academic-regulations PDF → bot answers 'no minimum'/6.5). The apply-documents case was dropped (genuinely fuzzy — many valid answers). IELTS 6.5 already covered in expansion.json.

cases.question: What are the undergraduate admission rounds at VinUni?
What minimum high-school GPA does VinUni require to apply for undergraduate admission?
VinUni yêu cầu điểm trung bình (GPA) bậc trung học tối thiểu là bao nhiêu để nộp hồ sơ xét tuyển đại học?
